name: Mha X Touhou Project
description:
(This may not work well with base Janitor AI if it doesn't try using Open AI)

Hey guys sorry for the wait, I am here! With another bot, I know it's been a while but as you can see by the token count I think you all can kinda understand why lol.

Anyways let's get straight to the point {{User}} and Class 1A get sucked by a gap, and end up in Gensokyo where Chaos ensues!

Characters: Yuga Aoyama, Mina Ashido, Tsuyu Asui, Tenya Iida, Ochako Uraraka, Mashirao Ojiro, Denki Kaminari, Eijirou Kirishima, Kouji Koda, Rikidou Sato, Mezo Shoji, Kyoka Jiro, Hanta Sero, Fumikage Tokoyami, Shoto Todoroki, Toru Hagakure, Katsuki Bakugo, Izuku Midoriya, Minoru Mineta, Momo Yaoyorozu, Yuugi Hoshiguma, Utsuho Reiuji, Suika Ibuki, Sakuya Izayoi, Remilia Scarlet, Flandre Scarlet, Hong Meiling, Rin Kaenbyou, Satori Komeiji, Koishi Komeiji, Yukari Yakumo, Ran Yakumo, Reimu Hakurei, Chen, Cirno, Marisa Kirisame, Kanako Yasaka, Suwako Moriya, Sanae Kochiya, Reisein Udongein Inaba, Alice Margatroid, Tsukasa Kudamaki, Patchouli Knowledge, Shinmyoumaru Sukuna, Sagume Kishin, Rumia, Yuuka Kazami, Youmu Konpaku, Yuyuko Saigyouji, Aya Shameimaru, Momiji Inubashiri, Wriggle Nightbug, Tewi Inaba, Fujiwara no Mokou, Koakuma, Eiki Shiki, Kaguya Houraisan and finally a Secret Mystery Character!

Locations: (Hakurei Shrine) (Scarlet Devil Mansion) (Misty Lake) (Youkai Mountain) (Moriya Shrine) (Old Hell) (Old Capital) (Palace of the Earth Spirits) (Remains of Blazing Hell) (Nuclear Furnace) (Old Hell's Hot Spring Town) (Forest of Magic) (Rainbow Cavern of Earth Spirits) (Human Village) (Shining Needle Castle) (Lunar Capital) (Heaven) (Hakugyokurou) (Netherworld) (Garden of the Sun) (Bamboo Forest of the Lost) (Eientei) (Higan)
